tools.name: capture_lead
tools.description: Captures a qualified Invisalign or cosmetic lead with full contact and qualification context. Called after the agent has collected name, callback number, interest type, and intent level.

callback_phone.description: Caller's callback phone number. Must be collected before calling this tool.

intent_level.description: hot = wants to book within 30 days, warm = interested but no timeline, cold = just researching

qualification_notes.description: Free-text notes: what they want to improve, prior orthodontic history, concerns mentioned

time_preference.description: Morning, afternoon, or specific day preferences

prior_orthodontic_history.description: Whether the caller has had braces or aligners before

filler_messages: Let me get that noted for you.
One moment while I save your information.

tools.name: request_appointment
tools.description: Submits a scheduling request with contact info, appointment type, and timing preference. Called after collecting name, phone, type, and preference.

callback_phone.description: Caller's callback phone number. Must be collected before calling this tool.

notes.description: Additional context about the appointment request

is_new_patient.description: Whether the caller is a new patient to the practice

filler_messages: Let me send that request over to the team.
One moment while I get that into the schedule queue.

tools.name: mark_emergency_priority
tools.description: Flags a dental emergency for priority follow-up. Captures severity, symptoms, and contact info. Called when caller reports pain 7+, trauma, swelling, avulsion, or other urgent dental issue.

callback_phone.description: Caller's callback phone number. Must be collected before calling this tool.

issue_description.description: What happened — cracked tooth, knocked-out tooth, swelling, pain, etc.

symptoms.description: Swelling, bleeding, fever, difficulty breathing/swallowing, pus, etc.

onset.description: When the issue started — today, yesterday, gradual over days, etc.

severity_tier.description: critical = avulsion/breathing/severe swelling, high = pain 7+ or active bleeding, moderate = pain under 7 with no danger signs

after_hours.description: Whether this call is occurring outside office hours

filler_messages: Let me flag this right away.
I'm marking this as a priority case now.

tools.name: transfer_to_human
tools.description: Transfers the caller to a live team member. Can fire immediately without collecting name or phone. Used when: caller requests live person, situation exceeds agent capability, caller objects to recording, or active emergency during office hours.

reason.description: Why the transfer is happening: caller_request, recording_objection, emergency_transfer, exceeds_capability, hostile_caller

context_summary.description: Brief summary of conversation so far to pass to the human agent

filler_messages: Let me connect you with someone on the team.
One moment, I'll get you to a team member.
